<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Memantine Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of patients with moderate to severe Alzheimer’s disease.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.5%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（99.5%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（99.4%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.4%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.7%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（98.7%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（98.5%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（98.4%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（98.2%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（98.1%）</li>
<li>osteoarthritis susceptibility（97.8%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（97.6%）</li>
<li>tendinitis（97.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension, primary, autosomal recessive（97.5%）</li>
<li>gout（97.5%）</li>
<li>myositis fibrosa（97.4%）</li>
<li>idiopathic granulomatous myositis（97.4%）</li>
<li>fibromyalgia（97.2%）</li>
<li>obsolete patella aplasia, coxa vara, and tarsal synostosis（97.2%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（97.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
